# Live Nation Venue Map

> Interactive 3D venue map showcasing Live Nation properties across the United States. A Consume & Create production.

## About

Live Nation operates venues and properties nationwide — each one rooted in its own neighborhood, its own history, its own culture. This interactive experience features over 30 venues with immersive 3D visualization, SVG line-drawing animations, and detailed venue profiles including galleries, video content, and team information.

## Features

- Interactive 3D map of the United States with venue markers
- Venue detail pages with hero SVG animations and flashlight logo reveals
- Image galleries with staggered layouts
- Background audio player with drag-to-adjust volume
- Mobile-responsive with static map fallback
- Camera fly-to animations when selecting venues

## Technology

Built with React 19, Three.js (React Three Fiber), and Sanity CMS. Content is managed through Sanity Studio and delivered via GROQ queries.

## Navigation

- Home: /map/ — Interactive 3D US map with all venue locations
- Venue pages: /map/venue/{slug} — Individual venue profiles

## Contact

A Consume & Create Productions project.
Website: https://consumeandcreate.co
